    C

    ca(WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Creates a new private CA.
    caDays() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Gets the number of days a CA signing certificate will be valid.
    cert(WebKey, Path) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Replaces the X509 certificate chain of a JWK.
    create(String[]) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Generates a new key by arguments

    D

    days() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Gets the number of days self- and CA-signed certs are valid.

    E

    export(PrintStream, WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Exports a PEM-encpded key and certificate data.
    export(PrintStream, X509CertificateAuthority, BigInteger) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Exports an PEM-encpded X509 certificate chain for a CA-signed cert.

    F

    formatPki(int, boolean[]) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Formats X509 PKI extensions for a certificate
    formatSerial(BigInteger) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Formats a serial number as unpadded Base64 URL encoded.
    formatSerialOSSL(BigInteger) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Formats a serial number in hex format consistent with OpenSSL.

    I

    iu.crypt.cli - package iu.crypt.cli
     
    iu.util.crypt.cli - module iu.util.crypt.cli
    Web crypto CLI utilities module

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Main entry point.

    P

    parseSerial(String) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Parses a serial number from hex format consistent with OpenSSL.
    print(PrintStream, WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Prints human readable key metadata.
    print(PrintStream, X509CertificateAuthority) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Prints human readable CA metadata.

    R

    req(PrintStream, WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Generates a new certificate request.
    revoke(X509CertificateAuthority, BigInteger) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Returns a copy of a CA with a certificate revoked.

    S

    self(WebKey) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Adds a self-signed X509 certificate to the JWK.
    sign(X509CertificateAuthority, Path) - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Returns a copy of a CA with a new signed certificate appended to the valid certificate store.
    subjectOrg() - Static method in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    Reads the X509 subject organization from environment IU_CRYPT_CLI_PKI_ORG or System property iu.crypt.cli.pki.org.

    U

    USAGE - Static variable in class iu.crypt.cli.WebKeyCli
    CLI Usage Document, printed before stack trace if an error occurs.

    W

    WebKeyCli - Class in iu.crypt.cli
    CLI tool for generating and manipulating WebKeys.
